# Document Templates

Reusable markdown templates for spec-driven development. Used across all five stages of the Blueprint lifecycle.

## Templates

- `research-brief.md` — Structured findings from deep research (Stage 1)
- `PRD.md` — Product Requirements Document (Stage 1)
- `technical-spec.md` — Feature technical spec (Stage 2)
- `api-spec.md` — Per-endpoint spec format (Stage 2)
- `data-model-spec.md` — Schema design spec (Stage 2)
- `auth-spec.md` — Auth flow spec (Stage 2)
- `architecture.md` — System architecture doc (Stage 2)
- `deployment.md` — Deployment & infrastructure doc (Stage 4)
- `api-reference.md` — Full API catalogue (Stage 2/4)
- `CHANGELOG.md` — Versioned changelog format (Stage 4)
